query:
SELECT aal.articleId, aal.affiliateLinkId, aal.anchorText, al.name, LEFT(al.url, 80) as url_preview 
FROM article_affiliate_links aal 
JOIN affiliate_links al ON aal.affiliateLinkId = al.id 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mexMZK3NDs3KsAz.c9d58c93f039 --database RymVrvaM7i66nf7Xs2w9Hu --execute SELECT aal.articleId, aal.affiliateLinkId, aal.anchorText, al.name, LEFT(al.url, 80) as url_preview 
FROM article_affiliate_links aal 
JOIN affiliate_links al ON aal.affiliateLinkId = al.id 
LIMIT 10;
